query: 我在看 OrderService 的 checkout flow，發現高併發下會 oversell。我已經 trace 過 inventory deduction 那段大概是 message 重複被消費。我想跟你討論一下要走 idempotency key 還是 outbox pattern，這兩個方向蠻不一樣的，要不要先幫我整理一下脈絡？

ok so the orders table is 4.2M rows now, p95 on findRecentPending is 12s and we have a deploy window tomorrow. should i add a composite index (status, created_at desc) or rewrite to cursor pagination? need your read before i commit either direction
等等我看不懂你剛剛問什麼，你說的那個 saga 跟 offset commit 是什麼意思？可以再講一次嗎
I'm lost — too much jargon. can you back up and tell me in plain English where in the system this is happening before we talk about kafka rebalances

team's debating splitting payments out of the monolith into its own service this quarter. dependencies are nasty (shared user table, async webhooks to billing) and the deploy story is unclear. before i pick a side i'd like you to lay out the actual fork for me
跟不上你剛剛講的，那個 CDC + debezium + 雙寫的 race 我完全沒概念，先給我一個 mental model 就好
我們現在 caching layer 要選 redis cluster 還是 dynamodb dax，兩個 team 各有偏好。可以幫我用結構化的方式攤開來看嗎？包含 reversibility 跟 downstream 影響
RCA 寫到一半卡住了 — 我覺得 root cause 可能是 connection pool 用完，但也可能是 downstream timeout 太短導致 retry storm，要不要先幫我建一下 mental model 再決定接下來 fork 怎麼走
what?? 你剛剛那個 quorum-based reconciliation 是什麼？沒頭沒尾的，給我完整脈絡再問我
before you ask me to pick between event sourcing and CRUD for the new audit-trail service, can you actually frame the decision for me — i don't even know what's at stake here
what is the saga pattern? i've heard it mentioned in a few design docs at work and want to understand the concept
rename the variable `cnt` to `pendingOrderCount` across OrderRepository.ts and its test file
just decide which log level to use for the retry-exhausted branch, don't ask me, you've seen the codebase
我要寫 incident postmortem，timeline 已經整理好了，幫我用 5-whys 把 root cause 段落補完，事故是 2026-05-12 的 payment service outage
let's brainstorm a new feature — i want users to be able to share their playlists with a custom thumbnail. we haven't started any code yet, just exploring what this could look like
review this PR for me: https://github.com/acme/orders-api/pull/4821 — focus on the new BatchProcessor class and tell me if there are bugs
the integration test test_checkout_concurrent is flaky, fails maybe 1 in 8 runs with `AssertionError: expected 1 row, got 2`. help me figure out why
refactor UserService to extract the email-validation logic into its own module. straightforward split, just do it and show me the diff when done
write the README section explaining how our outbox-publisher worker handles message ordering — audience is new backend hires, casual tone ok
從這個 logs.json 抽出所有 status >= 500 的 request，group by endpoint，輸出 markdown table 給我，欄位順序 endpoint / count / p95_ms
